rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEONARDO ROSILLO SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST, CREATED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #12, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Investment management fees were charged during this time period, including $19,865 to EP Wealth Advisors and $8,396 to First Republic Investment Management (.75% of FMV at the end of each quarter). 2) Attorney fees for trust administration is requested at average of ~$803/hr for attorneys and $383/hr for paralegals. 3) Investments were purchased without prior court authority. Additionally, even though there are two mutual funds (JOHIX and MIEIX) that were reported as being purchased, there were many more different securities at the end of this accounting than the last (e.g. ISHARES TR S&P NTL AMT FREE, DFA INTERNATIONL CORE EQUITY, ISHARES TR CORE MSCI EAFE, ISHARES TR RUSELL 1000, etc), which were not any of the additional investments allowed under the 9/12/22 order approving the 11th account. 4) $14,800 was reimbursed to the beneficiary's mother for HVAC installation. 5) $9,805 was reimbursed to the beneficiary's mother for vacations, but which were not itemized. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF JORDAN J. SUN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #4, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required for failure to address Examiner's Notes, which contained the following issues: o Summary of Account on Judicial Council Form is mandatory. o Please provide calculation of bond (Par. 3 is insufficient). o Par. 5 states that the interest in the probate estate has not been distributed yet from the father's estate, but the order for final distribution was filed on 3/11/22. Monthly rent is also being received and real property expenses (mortgage, insurance, and property taxes) are being paid, which indicates that the guardianship received the distribution. o Only $300/month is being received in rental income from 30% interest the real property for each child, which allegedly has a fair market value of over $1M. Please explain. o Please explain why minors' mother is not paying for the listed education, medical, and living expenses of each child. o Cash has not been verified for either accounting. o Liabilities schedule has not been included for either accounting. o Jack's beginning balance does not match the ending balance of the 3rd account, which listed only $16,876.68 cash. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TIMOTHY YEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: a. Attorney was advised that Probate Code 9202(b) was revised to require notice to the California Victim Compensation Board even if heirs have been previously confined. The revised allegation made in the 2nd amendment filed on 5/15/24 does not address whether the heir was previously confined. b. Attorney was advised that a waiver of account needed to be filed by Greg Yee as administrator of the Estate of Diana Yee. Instead, waivers of account have been filed by the alleged heirs of the Estate of Diana Yee. c) Notice of Hearing on filing the Second Amendment was served on 5/1/24; however, the Second Amendment was filed on 5/15/24, and notice of filing a document cannot be given if the document has not already been filed. Furthermore, the Second Amendment was signed by the attorney and petitioner on 5/9/24; thus it appears that Notice was given even prior to execution of the document. d) The proposed order lodged on 5/17/24: a. Does not specify all assets on hand (including securities and automobile) and does not delineate the specific assets that will be distributed. b. States that Decedent died testate, which is incorrect. c. Misstates the amount of reserve (which was changed to $2,000 in the Second Amendment). d. Misstates the cash on hand ($2,683.29), which was alleged to be $2,183.29 in paragraph 4 of the Second Amendment. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HELENE RENE GLIEBERMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) This pleading was not e-filed until 5/6/24. Notice of it was mailed on 5/3/24. [LRSF 14.14 A.] 2) Item 3d of the petition has two different figures for the estimated value of the estate. 3) Item 3d(3) of the petition was checked, indicating that all heirs at law have waived bond, but item 3d(2) should have been checked because the [surviving] beneficiaries are adults and have waived bond, and the will does not require a bond. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN CLARENCE SCOTT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/18/2024. The following issues to be cleared seven days prior. (1) Need Proof of Subscribing Witnesses. Petition alleges the will is self-proving; however, the witnesses attested that the will consisted of one (1) page while the will consisted of multiple pages. (2) Petition to affirm info in #5.a.(3)-(4) re: surviving registered domestic partner. (3) Petition to affirm info in #5.b. re: a surviving stepchild. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROSA MARIA REDOBLA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/9/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No proof of service of the Notice of Petition to Administer Estate has been filed. (3) Notice must also have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (4) No proof of publication of the notice has been filed. (5) No Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities has been filed. (6) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. (7) The will is not self-proving. Proof of Subscribing Witness must be filed. (8) All persons mentioned in the will must be listed in item 8 of the petition. Quintin Lima Redobla is missing. His date of death must also be set forth. Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 6/28/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
